title: centaurea tymphaea
intro: Centaurea tymphaea, also known as mountain knapweed, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Greece. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea tymphaea include treating urinary tract infections, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health issues, though its use requires caution due to potential side effects.
